channel.title: Go on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Go on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Go: Absolute Beginner
item.description: My mom died when she was fairly young. Her carnival glass collection, her silver, her jewelry, I have nothing of those things. I think her new husband tossed all the childhood things of mine I was keeping at her place, all my childhood books I’d hoped to pass on to my kids. All I have of her are three gifts she got me; my Orange Teddy, a boxed collection of The Lord of the Rings (which will be my son’s), and this old Othello board.
